New Tab Unlimited Bookmarks

1. Readme

New Tab Unlimited Bookmarks is a Chrome extension that helps you be more productive.
It lets you add and customize an unlimited number of bookmarks, so your favorite links are instantly available every time you open a new tab.

2. Setup

You need to configure your bookmarks source first:

  1. Check your Bookmarks bar, locate a folder that you want to show on your Chrome's Start page. If not visible, press CTRL + SHIFT + B on Windows, ⌘ + SHIFT + B on Mac.
  2. Create or choose an existing bookmark folder. (eg. development)
  3. Go to ⚙ Settings button below and add the name of that folder from Step 2. Save settings.

3. Enjoy!

Now everytime you open a new tab, you will see your bookmarks from the folder that you picked on Step 2. You can always configure this via Settings link which is located on the bottom center of the tab's content.

⚙ Settings

Add bookmark

Settings

Existing folder(s) for your "Start page" bookmarks. One or more folders separated by comma (,). e.g. personal,work,random
Display folder name:
Display the folder name section and text.
Layout:
Layout of the bookmarks.
Show sub-folders:
Display bookmarks from subfolders of the root folder.
Bookmarks container width:
How much the bookmarks container will stretch.
Bookmark item icon:
Display icons from bookmarks URLs.
Bookmark item size:
How big the bookmark item font and icon will render.
Bookmark reordering:
Allow bookmark dragging and rearranging.
Bookmark search bar:
Show or hide the bookmarks search bar.
Top bookmarks:
Your most-clicked bookmarks (tracked locally on this page).
Last bookmarks:
Last 15 bookmarks you opened from this page.
Theme:
Visual theme for the bookmarks page.
